# Regex fixtures for skill: receiving-code-review
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the nits? word boundary: embedded nit (uNIT,
# iNITialize, moNIToring, defiNITion) must not fire a process skill.

MATCH: address the review comments
MATCH: respond to review feedback
MATCH: fix the nits from the review
MATCH: changes requested on my pr
MATCH: a few nitpicks on naming

NO_MATCH: add a unit test for the parser
NO_MATCH: initialize the cache on startup
NO_MATCH: add monitoring for the queue depth
NO_MATCH: update the type definition
